title: EscrowPolicy v1
description: Machine-readable schema for one trusted escrow policy binding a supervisory settlement node to an accountable organization in the host-ledger rail.

policy/id.description: Stable identifier of the escrow policy.

created-at.description: Timestamp when the escrow policy became auditable.

federation/id.description: Federation scope in which the escrow policy applies.

escrow/node-id.description: Node currently serving the escrow supervisor role under this policy.

operator/org-ref.description: Accountable organization operating the escrow policy.

settlement/unit.description: Internal settlement unit governed by this escrow policy in MVP.

confirmation/modes.description: Confirmation modes admitted by the escrow policy.

dispute/default-window-sec.description: Default dispute window applied when a contract does not override it.

auto-release/default-sec.description: Default auto-release delay applied after the relevant acceptance stage when a contract does not override it.

partial-release/allowed.description: Whether partial release is permitted under this escrow policy.

arbiter/required-above-risk.description: Minimum risk tier above which arbiter confirmation becomes mandatory under local policy.

status.description: Administrative lifecycle state of the escrow policy.

suspended-at.description: Timestamp when the escrow policy was suspended, if applicable.

retired-at.description: Timestamp when the escrow policy was retired, if applicable.
